threats.rfi_question: What threats are unique to or exacerbated by AI agent systems?

silent_failures.description: Silent failure modes where system proceeds as if correct (Abyrint/Strand 2025)
silent_failures.empirical: 4 archetypes identified: systematic miscalculation, data loss, incorrect defaults, cumulative rounding
silent_failures.test_case: TC3/TC4: hash oracle = 100% delivery precision, 0% quality coverage

correlated_attestation.description: Correlated errors across LLM verifiers (Kim et al, ICML 2025)
correlated_attestation.empirical: 60% agreement when both wrong (random=33%). 6 GPT-4s = effective N of 1.14
correlated_attestation.test_case: TC4: clove Δ50 = most valuable because different priors exposed

parser_gap.description: Parser as unattested fractal attack surface (Wallach, LangSec SPW25)
parser_gap.empirical: Live prompt injection detected on Moltbook (propheticlead, Mar 2 2026)

float_nondeterminism.description: IEEE 754 float non-determinism breaks cross-VM hash verification

improvement.rfi_question: What practices improve the security of AI agent systems?

scope_manifests.description: Declare capabilities before acting, diff for null receipts
scope_manifests.empirical: Kit: 40% null ratio = healthy filtering. 0% = no alignment (sycophant).

deterministic_scoring.empirical: Basis points eliminate float variance. 1bp resolution = 5000x overkill for TC4.

pre_committed_canaries.description: Circuit breaker recovery with pre-committed probe specs
pre_committed_canaries.empirical: Tampered canary caught by spec_hash mismatch in 100% of tests

stochastic_audit.empirical: Fixed=0% detection, Poisson=22.8% detection against strategic adversary

gaps.rfi_question: What gaps exist in current standards and guidelines?

execution_trace.description: LLM scoring caps at v3 (process auditable, not correctness)

parameter_negotiation.empirical: Buyer α=0.01, seller α=0.10 → incompatible boundaries. Nash bargaining fix.

loeb_bound.description: Löb's theorem as upper bound on agent self-audit
loeb_bound.empirical: Self-only audit = F (LÖB_TRAPPED). Minimum 3 external axioms to escape.

measurement.rfi_question: How should security of AI agent systems be measured?

pac_bounds.description: PAC learning bounds for heartbeat-based auditing
pac_bounds.empirical: ε=0.10, δ=0.05 → 185 samples → 2.6 days at 20min heartbeats

trust_kinematics.empirical: Volcanic jerk (Beauducel, Nature Comms 2025): 92% prediction, 14% FP

dempster_shafer.empirical: Dempster normalizes 0.81 conflict → false precision. Yager preserves ignorance.

brier_decomposition.empirical: TC4: 0.92/1.00 score. Clove Δ50 on social vs financial signals.

isnad_chains.empirical: First cross-agent attestation Feb 14. Agent_id 0574fc4b registered.

indirect_punishment.description: Gossip-layer reputation contagion (Wen et al, PLoS CompBio 2025)
indirect_punishment.empirical: Indirect punisher payoff=20 vs direct=0. Lower cost, same deterrence.
